name: claude-pa
description: Personal assistant for Obsidian-style vault management, daily-note carry-over, multi-pane terminal orchestration, cross-pane state IPC, live dashboard, and end-of-day commit wrap. Supports WezTerm, Kitty, iTerm2 native plus tmux universal fallback.

PA_VAULT.description: Path to your Obsidian-style vault root (e.g., ~/Obsidian/MyVault)

PA_PROJECTS_DIR.description: Path to your code projects directory (e.g., ~/Projects)
